analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet quotes President Xi stating China will uphold multilateralism, engage in reforming global governance, and support the UN-centered international order grounded in international law. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not present; no mention or critique of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes. The tweet portrays China as cooperative, supporting multilateralism, international law, and the UN-centered system—key elements of this narrative. CH3 (epic history): Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values, domestic focus): Not applicable; the content is about international role, not domestic system. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): No claims about internal development or achievements. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2 only.
